OPRTG_AUTHRTY_PACE_IND 

LABEL: Operating Authority Indicator: PACE — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) programs for the MC_PLAN_ID; ever in 
the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: OPRTG_AUTHRTY_PACE_IND

FILE(S): APL base
